_comment: hooks use PowerShell 7 (pwsh) via shell:powershell. On Mac/Linux, rewrite using bash syntax (INPUT=$(cat) / jq).

hooks.command: $inputJson = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $payload = $inputJson | ConvertFrom-Json; $filePath = $payload.tool_input.file_path; if ($filePath -match '(^|[\\/])\.env($|[.\\/])') { Write-Error "Blocked: $filePath is protected"; exit 2 }; exit 0

$inputJson = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $payload = $inputJson | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $payload.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'git (push --force|push -f|reset --hard|checkout \.|clean -f)') { Write-Error "Blocked: destructive git command"; exit 2 }; exit 0
